overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school setting, showing a robed student character exploring castle architecture. The character moves from an outdoor balcony with a mechanical orrery, descends spiral staircases through stone corridors, and enters an astronomy tower room with star-painted walls. The environment features detailed gothic stonework, wooden interiors, and other student NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking around the large mechanical orrery on the wooden balcony, overlooking the castle towers

entered.detail: large brass mechanical device with rotating rings and spheres
curved wooden handrail surrounding the balcony edge
gothic stone towers and rooftops visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a wooden balcony with a large brass orrery, overlooking a gothic castle complex. The space is open to the overcast sky but sheltered by the building structure, with stone towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden interior corridor leading to spiral staircase

events.description: enters indoor wooden corridor from the exterior balcony

agents.ego_description: walking from the balcony into the wooden interior and approaching the spiral staircase entrance

entered.detail: vertical wooden planks with beam supports

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wooden interior corridor, leaving the balcony behind. The space features wooden plank walls and a spiral staircase descending into the lower levels of the castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed spiral staircase descending through stone walls

events.description: transitions from wooden to stone spiral staircase
lighting becomes dimmer as descending into the enclosed stone stairwell

agents.ego_description: descending the spiral staircase, transitioning from wooden to stone architecture

entered.detail: rough-hewn grey stone blocks forming the stairwell walls
iron chandelier suspended in the center of the spiral

segments.scene_description: The character descends the spiral staircase as the environment transitions from wood to grey stone. The space becomes more enclosed and dimly lit, with a hanging chandelier visible in the center void of the spiral.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular room with fireplace leading to stone corridor

events.description: exits spiral staircase into circular room with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking through the circular room with the fireplace and entering a stone corridor, following another robed student ahead

notable_agents.action: student in black robe walking ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and ornate mantel
grey stone block walls with narrow arched windows

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the spiral stairs into a circular room featuring a large stone fireplace. The character then proceeds through a stone corridor, following another student in robes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone and wood stairwell with students passing

events.description: enters narrower stone stairwell with other students present

agents.ego_description: descending wooden stairs in a narrow stone corridor alongside other students

notable_agents.action: blonde student in black robe walking down stairs ahead

entered.detail: tight stone corridor with wooden staircase and support beams
thick wooden structural beams crossing the walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends through a narrower stairwell with rough stone walls and wooden stairs. Other students are present, walking in the same direction down the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: astronomy tower classroom with star-painted walls

events.description: enters astronomy tower room with blue star-patterned walls
bright sunlight streams through tall arched windows

agents.ego_description: entering the astronomy tower room and walking toward the tall windows, passing other students

notable_agents.action: student standing near the far wall observing the room

entered.detail: large circular room with high ceilings and astronomical decorations
deep blue walls painted with golden stars and constellations
tall gothic windows with bright sunlight streaming through

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent astronomy tower room with deep blue walls painted with golden stars. Bright sunlight streams through tall arched windows, illuminating the space. The room contains wooden tables and celestial decorations, with other students present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open-air balcony through the descending depths of a gothic castle, finally emerging into a luminous celestial chamber. It begins beside a large brass orrery on a wooden balcony overlooking distant stone towers under an overcast sky, before moving inward through a wooden corridor. As the character descends a spiral staircase, the environment shifts from warm wood to dim, enclosed grey stone centered around a hanging chandelier. The scene then opens into a circular room with a large stone fireplace and transitions through narrow, rough-hewn stairwells alongside other robed students. Finally, the camera enters a magnificent astronomy tower where the dark stone gives way to deep blue walls painted with golden stars, illuminated by bright sunlight streaming through tall arched windows.
